summary: Comprehensive frontend-only testing of Mi Siembra Inteligente 2.0 PWA. All 10 requested features tested successfully. The app is a fully functional offline-first PWA using IndexedDB for data storage.

backend_issues.note: Backend is intentionally dormant - this is a frontend-only PWA using IndexedDB

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby` for DialogContent - minor accessibility issue but doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Code quality is excellent - well-organized components with proper data-testid attributes
IndexedDB implementation via idb library is solid with proper CRUD operations
Theme context and data context are properly separated
Seed data is comprehensive with demo crops, tasks, diary entries, pests, and treatments
Minor: Some dialogs could benefit from aria-describedby for better accessibility
test_credentials: No credentials required - PWA without authentication
seed_data_creation: Demo data auto-seeds on first load via seedData.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working. App uses IndexedDB exclusively. Bottom nav has 5 tabs (Inicio, Calendario, Mi Huerto, Tareas, Diario). Hamburger menu has 7 secondary pages (Catálogo, Plagas, Tratamientos, Diagnóstico, Mapa, Cosechas, Opciones). Theme switching (light/dark/system) works. Export backup generates JSON file.

homepage_dashboard.details: Shows 6 active crops, 3 pending tasks, 1 ready for harvest, 6 total harvests. Overdue tasks highlighted in red.

tasks_page.details: Lists overdue/today/upcoming tasks. Water reminder creation works. New task creation works with title/date/type fields.

mi_huerto_crops.details: Shows 6 active crops. Stage filtering (germinación/vegetativo/floración/cosecha) works. New crop creation works.

calendar.details: Shows current month with task indicators. Climate recommendations visible (tropical, hemisferio Norte). Sowing suggestions for current month displayed.

diario.details: 10 diary entries displayed with type filters. New entry creation with text and type works. Photo upload UI present.

catalogo.details: 10 crops in catalog with category filters. Crop details expand on click. New catalog crop creation works.

garden_map.details: 3 bed zones displayed (1 hydro, 2 soil). Crops shown in each zone. Legend shows soil/hydroponía distinction.

settings_theme.details: Light/dark/system theme switching works. Climate and hemisphere settings visible. Export backup generates JSON file.

diagnosis.details: Full diagnostic flow works: start > symptom selection (Hojas/Tallos/General) > results with pest identification (Pulgón, Mosca Blanca) and organic treatment recommendations.

bottom_navigation.details: 5 tabs work correctly: Inicio, Calendario, Mi Huerto, Tareas, Diario. Each navigates to respective page with data-testid.

hamburger_menu.details: 7 secondary menu items accessible: Catálogo, Plagas, Tratamientos, Diagnóstico, Mapa, Cosechas, Opciones.

pwa_features.indexeddb: Working - stores settings, beds, catalog, crops, tasks, diary, harvests, pests, treatments, photos
pwa_features.offline_mode: Banner displays 'Modo offline - Los datos se guardan localmente' when offline
